selectedTaskBefore.title: Defer broad multi-agent orchestration until nested root semantics are deterministic and evidence-backed
selectedTaskBefore.notes: Do not broaden autonomous multi-agent processes until inspection-root and execution-root behavior are aligned, test-backed, and documented.

selectedTaskAfter.title: Defer broad multi-agent orchestration until nested root semantics are deterministic and evidence-backed
selectedTaskAfter.notes: Locked the current product boundary to a sequential single-agent loop, documented that broader multi-agent orchestration remains deferred until nested workspace/inspection/execution/verification root policy is deterministic, test-backed, and evidence-backed, and added docs-validation coverage so that guardrail stays explicit.
